fast.label: fast
fast.rhythm_desc: quick but readable anime motion, cuts or light accents on strong beats
fast.lighting_desc: strobing but controlled {main_color} accents on beat peaks
fast.transition_desc: beat-matched impact cuts and fast reflection wipes

slow.label: slow
slow.rhythm_desc: long takes, slow camera travel, minimal character motion
slow.lighting_desc: slow breathing {main_color} glow with long silver rim fades
slow.transition_desc: slow dissolves and lingering match cuts

medium.label: medium
medium.rhythm_desc: measured musical motion, camera accents every phrase
medium.lighting_desc: measured {main_color} pulses with subtle secondary light response
medium.transition_desc: smooth rhythmic match cuts and gentle push transitions

pacing_desc.fast: fast cuts with energetic camera movement
pacing_desc.slow: slow cinematic cuts with lingering frames
pacing_desc.rising: measured pacing that expands in chorus sections
